title: Create board with description
excerpt:
Hi, i can’t find anywhare how to create a board with api v2 passing the board description. can somebody help me? 
thanks

posts.author: abalest14 (Alessandro)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, i can’t find anywhare how to create a board with api v2 passing the board description. can somebody help me?
thanks

posts.author: Scott-monday.com (Scott Underwood)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @abalest14

I’m afraid the ability to include a board description when creating a new board via the API v2 is not currently possible.

With that said, I’ve since passed this feedback along to our team for review and consideration as we continue to make improvements to the API

If you have any other suggested improvements - please let us know!

-Scott
